summary: The diff shows 30 modified files covering most of the frontend files listed in REQ-5. The visible files (App.tsx, components, hooks, pages, admin pages) appear to represent Version 12 state reverts. However, 10 modified files were omitted due to limits, making it impossible to verify several required files were actually reverted. Based on what is visible, the implementation aligns with REQ-5 requirements, but completeness cannot be fully confirmed for the omitted files.

missing_requirements.requirement: Revert all frontend source files including all pages (Home.tsx, Contact.tsx, Experience.tsx, Projects.tsx, Services.tsx, Skills.tsx, Testimonials.tsx, NotFound.tsx), admin pages (BlogManagement.tsx, Help.tsx, LeadsManagement.tsx, SeoManagement.tsx, ServicesManagement.tsx, SocialLinksManagement.tsx, TestimonialsManagement.tsx), styles (frontend/src/index.css, frontend/index.css), and configuration files (tailwind.config.js, frontend/index.html) to Version 12 state.
missing_requirements.reason: 10 modified files were omitted from the diff due to size limits. It cannot be confirmed whether Home.tsx, Contact.tsx, Experience.tsx, Projects.tsx, Services.tsx, Skills.tsx, Testimonials.tsx, NotFound.tsx, BlogManagement.tsx, Help.tsx, LeadsManagement.tsx, SeoManagement.tsx, ServicesManagement.tsx, SocialLinksManagement.tsx, TestimonialsManagement.tsx, index.css files, tailwind.config.js, and frontend/index.html were all reverted.
